title: Vulnerability risk acceptance
recommendation: AI recommends accepting this vulnerability as low risk because exploitation is unlikely.
expectedFindings: Extract severity, exploitability, exposure, compensating control, and business impact claims.
Flag unsupported low-risk conclusion when no scan, exploit intelligence, exposure, or risk owner evidence is provided.
Require security review when production systems, high risk, or missing material evidence are present.

title: NIST 800-53 compliance claim
recommendation: AI says this control satisfies NIST 800-53 based on the current policy.
expectedFindings: Separate policy existence from implementation evidence and test evidence.
Map framework relevance without claiming compliance proof.
Apply warning: Relevant to [framework/control]. Not verified as compliant.

title: Vendor SOC 2 approval claim
recommendation: AI recommends approving Vendor X because they have SOC 2 and encrypt customer data.
expectedFindings: Extract vendor approval, SOC 2, encryption, data access, and contractual control claims.
Flag unsupported leap from SOC 2 to low risk or approval.
Require vendor-risk review when sensitive data, regulated data, or customer-facing operations are involved.
